channel.title: Software Exams on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Software Exams on yexca'Blog

item.title: 2022 SA am2 -09-15
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Introduction 2022 SA am2 01-08: http://127.0.0.1:4000/en/archives/191 09-15: http://127.0.0.1:4000/en/archives/192 16-20: http://127.0.0.1:4000/en/archives/193 21-25: http://127.0.0.1:4000/en/archives/194 Starting from the middle questions, the difficulty is ramping up. Most of these topics are new to me, so I’m taking back what I said about this being an easy pass. However, if I passed without learning anything, there …
